data.title: Chevron Consolidates Venezuela Heavy Oil Position in Asset Swap
data.description: In Houston today, Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) revealed a significant asset swap deal with Petroleos de Venezuela, S. A. (“PDVSA”) and its subsidiaries. This arrangement will see Chevron's subsidiaries in Venezuela acquiring a 13.21% working interest in the Petroindependencia, S.A. joint venture. This will boost Chevron's total stake in the venture, strengthening their strategic assets in the country. The move aims to enhance operational focus and coordination among all parties involved, while streamlining their investments for mutual benefit.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Announces Results of Post-Closing Acceptance Period for Offer for JDE Peet's
data.description: A significant 97.75% of all shares have been tendered. This information comes from a collaborative press release involving Keurig Dr Pepper Inc., Kodiak BidCo B.V., and JDE Peet's N.V. This announcement is in compliance with Section 17, paragraph 4 of the Dutch Decree on public takeover bids, related to the current dealings.

data.title: Emerita Confirms Receipt of Unsolicited Offer Letter from Denarius Metals
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Emerita Resources Corp. disclosed that it had been presented with an unsolicited offer from Denarius Metals Corp. to purchase all of Emerita's outstanding common shares. The offer, extended at a 15% premium to Emerita's closing price on April 10, 2026, proposes compensation solely in Denarius common shares. Emerita is listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol EMO, as well as the OTCQX under EMOTF, and the FSE as LLJA.

data.title: XORTX Announces Closing of Acquisition of Vectus Kidney Anti-fibrotic Asset
data.description: A newly discovered chemical compound, VB4-P5, shows promise in tackling the pressing needs of both rare and common forms of chronic kidney disease. This novel chemical entity has the potential to address a significant gap in treatment options for patients with kidney issues. VB4-P5 presents a unique opportunity to make a positive impact in the medical field, especially with the increasing numbers of individuals affected by kidney diseases worldwide.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Announces Results of Post-Closing Acceptance Period for Offer for JDE Peet’s - 97.75% of all Shares tendered
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper has revealed the outcome of the post-closing acceptance period for its offer to acquire JDE Peet's, showing a high success rate of 97.75% of all shares tendered. This significant figure indicates a strong response from shareholders towards the acquisition deal.

data.title: Neptune Insurance Holdings to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Neptune Insurance Holdings Inc., the parent company of Neptune Flood Incorporated, will release its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The company, trading under the ticker symbol NP on the NYSE, has scheduled a conference call and webcast to review these results at 5:00 PM ET on the same day. Investors and stakeholders can join the discussion by dialing (800) 71XXXXX.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Cav Achieves FedRAMP High Authorization to Streamline Adoption of Continuous Cyber Assurance for U.S. Federal Agencies and High-Reliability Organizations
data.description: In Washington, CAV has achieved FedRAMP High authorization, aiming to streamline the adoption of continuous cyber assurance for U.S. federal agencies and high-reliability organizations. Notable entities such as the U.S. Air Force, U.S. Navy, BNP Paribas, Fiserv, and others trust the agentic AI-powered platform to provide significant benefits. These include delivering 90% faster audit and ATO cycles, along with facilitating millions of dollars in cost savings.

data.title: MiniLuxe Partners with 2026 NCAA Champion Kiki Rice as its Inaugural Brand Ambassador
data.description: A recent development in the world of business involves a WNBA draft pick becoming a brand ambassador and investor for MiniLuxe. This collaboration signifies a new direction for the company, with a focus on forming partnerships that align with a common goal. The WNBA Draftee's involvement as both a brand ambassador and investor highlights their commitment to supporting the brand and its mission. This strategic move showcases a growing trend of athletes branching out into entrepreneurial ventures, with the partnership emphasizing the significance of shared values and objectives.

data.title: Stewart Information Services Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: In Houston, Stewart Information Services Corporation (NYSE: STC) disclosed plans for a conference call discussing their first quarter 2026 earnings. The call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, April 23, 2026, following the earnings release on Wednesday, April 22. To join, individuals can dial (800) 274-8461 (USA) or (203) 518-9814 (International) with the access code STCQ126. Additionally, a replay of the conference call will be accessible afterwards.

data.title: Spyre Therapeutics Announces Proposed Public Offering of its Common Stock
data.description: WALTHAM, Mass., April 13, 2026 - Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: SYRE), a biotech company focusing on antibody engineering for immune diseases, has announced a $300.0 million public offering of its common stock. The underwriters may also purchase an additional $45.0 million of shares within 30 days. All shares in the offering will come from Spyre.

data.title: Sudden shift: CEO of StarkWare discloses layoffs amidst revenue-focused strategy; headcount reduced to boost income.
data.description: The co-founder and CEO of StarkWare, Eli Ben-Sasson, revealed that the company, which operates on the Ethereum platform, has reduced its staff numbers as part of a strategy to focus on boosting revenue.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- The Jackson Laboratory/
data.description: The Jackson Laboratory has recently bolstered its executive team with the appointment of Steven Holstein as the senior vice president of external affairs. This update was announced on April 13, 2026, through a news release via PR Newswire. The organization has implemented significant changes to enhance its leadership structure.
